*Envive Care Conference Review - V 4.0
Wound Status: Diabetic to Left foot / Measures 2.4 cm x 4.0 cm / Stage: N/A
Drainage present - serosanguineous, heavy. Odor present. Treatment: Foam dressing change daily.

Subjective: Patient reports pain at Left foot wound site, rates 5/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Diabetic diabetic Left foot measures 2.4 cm x 4.0 cm x 1.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 34% slough, 66% granulation tissue. Periwound: intact.
  Drainage: heavy. Odor: present, mild.
Assessment: Diabetic diabetic Left foot — not improving.
Plan: Debridement consult ordered. Offloading boot applied.
